subject: Lesson plan review
snippet: Hey Hari, I looked over your lesson plan for the fractions unit. Overall it's so...
body:
Hey Hari, I looked over your lesson plan for the fractions unit. Overall it's solid, but I think the warm-up activity might run long given the 45-minute period. Might want to trim it to 5 minutes instead of 10.

Also loved the manipulatives idea for the visual learners — mind if I borrow that for my class too?

subject: Re: Lesson plan review
snippet: Thanks for the feedback, James! You're right about the warm-up, I'll cut it down...
body:
Thanks for the feedback, James! You're right about the warm-up, I'll cut it down. I timed it in my head but forgot we lose a few minutes to transitions.

Of course, borrow away. I got the manipulatives idea from a workshop last year, happy to share the handout too.

subject: Parent-teacher conference
snippet: Hey love, just a heads up the school sent out the conference sign-up sheet. Did ...
body: Hey love, just a heads up the school sent out the conference sign-up sheet. Did you want to do evening slots or should we try to grab an early morning one before your first period?

subject: Re: Parent-teacher conference
snippet: Morning would be rough since I have hall duty at 7:45. Let's do evening, maybe t...
body: Morning would be rough since I have hall duty at 7:45. Let's do evening, maybe the 5:30 or 6pm slot so we still have time for dinner after.

subject: Re: Parent-teacher conference
snippet: 6pm works for me, I'll lock it in. Want me to book us a table at that Thai place...
body: 6pm works for me, I'll lock it in. Want me to book us a table at that Thai place after, or are we too wiped by then?

subject: Field trip permission slips
snippet: Hari, quick count check — I've got 18 permission slips back for the science muse...
body: Hari, quick count check — I've got 18 permission slips back for the science museum trip out of 27 kids. Can you nudge your homeroom kids who haven't turned theirs in?

subject: Re: Field trip permission slips
snippet: Will do, I'll send a reminder home today. Do we have a hard deadline from the mu...
body: Will do, I'll send a reminder home today. Do we have a hard deadline from the museum on headcount, or is there some wiggle room?

subject: Re: Field trip permission slips
snippet: They need final numbers by Friday for the bus company. If we're still short, I c...
body:
They need final numbers by Friday for the bus company. If we're still short, I can call a few parents directly Thursday night.

Also, are you still good to chaperone the reptile exhibit group?

subject: Re: Field trip permission slips
snippet: Yep, reptile exhibit it is. I'll have the updated count for you by Wednesday aft...
body: Yep, reptile exhibit it is. I'll have the updated count for you by Wednesday afternoon after I collect the rest.

subject: Department meeting agenda
snippet: Hari, are you presenting the curriculum update at Thursday's department meeting ...
body: Hari, are you presenting the curriculum update at Thursday's department meeting or is that Marcus's item this time?

subject: Re: Department meeting agenda
snippet: It's mine actually. I still need to put together slides on the new math standard...
body: It's mine actually. I still need to put together slides on the new math standards rollout. Any tips from when you did yours last semester?

subject: Re: Department meeting agenda
snippet: Keep it to 3 slides max, people zone out fast in those meetings. I'd focus on wh...
body:
Keep it to 3 slides max, people zone out fast in those meetings. I'd focus on what changes for teachers day-to-day, not the policy background.

Also bring printed handouts, half the room never opens the shared drive link.

subject: Re: Department meeting agenda
snippet: Good call on the handouts. I'll draft something tonight and send it your way for...
body: Good call on the handouts. I'll draft something tonight and send it your way for a sanity check before Thursday if that's okay.

subject: Re: Department meeting agenda
snippet: Of course, send it over whenever. I should be free after 8 to look it over with ...
body: Of course, send it over whenever. I should be free after 8 to look it over with you.

subject: Lunch this week?
snippet: I have a lighter schedule Wednesday, want to grab lunch near the school? There's...
body: I have a lighter schedule Wednesday, want to grab lunch near the school? There's that new sandwich place on 5th.

subject: Re: Lunch this week?
snippet: Wednesday's perfect, I only have a 40-minute break but that should be enough tim...
body: Wednesday's perfect, I only have a 40-minute break but that should be enough time. Let's say 12:15?

subject: Coffee next Tuesday?
snippet: Feel like we haven't just sat and talked in ages. Coffee next Tuesday morning be...
body: Feel like we haven't just sat and talked in ages. Coffee next Tuesday morning before work?

subject: Re: Coffee next Tuesday?
snippet: I'd love that. I don't need to be in until 8:15 that day so we could do 7am at t...
body: I'd love that. I don't need to be in until 8:15 that day so we could do 7am at the place near your apartment.

subject: Re: Coffee next Tuesday?
snippet: 7am works. I'll grab us a table by the window, it's usually quiet that early any...
body: 7am works. I'll grab us a table by the window, it's usually quiet that early anyway.

subject: Birthday brunch plans
snippet: So for my birthday I was thinking brunch instead of dinner this year, maybe that...
body: So for my birthday I was thinking brunch instead of dinner this year, maybe that rooftop spot downtown. What do you think?

subject: Re: Birthday brunch plans
snippet: Brunch sounds great, and that rooftop place has good reviews. Should we invite y...
body: Brunch sounds great, and that rooftop place has good reviews. Should we invite your sister and Marcus too or keep it small this year?

subject: Re: Birthday brunch plans
snippet: Let's invite them, the more the merrier. Can you check if the rooftop place take...
body: Let's invite them, the more the merrier. Can you check if the rooftop place takes reservations for groups of 6?

subject: Re: Birthday brunch plans
snippet: Just checked, they do group bookings if we call ahead. I'll ring them tomorrow a...
body: Just checked, they do group bookings if we call ahead. I'll ring them tomorrow and lock in a Saturday morning slot.

subject: Renewal options
snippet: Hey, the gym membership renewal notice came in. They're offering the annual plan...
body: Hey, the gym membership renewal notice came in. They're offering the annual plan at a discount if we lock it in before the 15th. Want to renew together again this year?

subject: Re: Renewal options
snippet: Yeah I'm in, the annual plan saved us a good chunk last year. Did they change th...
body: Yeah I'm in, the annual plan saved us a good chunk last year. Did they change the terms at all or is it the same as before?

subject: Re: Renewal options
snippet: Mostly the same, though they added a freeze option for up to 2 months which is n...
body: Mostly the same, though they added a freeze option for up to 2 months which is nice for summer travel. I'll forward you the link.

subject: Re: Renewal options
snippet: Got the link, thanks. I'll fill out my half tonight. Should we also renew the sh...
body: Got the link, thanks. I'll fill out my half tonight. Should we also renew the shared streaming plan while we're doing renewals?

subject: Re: Renewal options
snippet: Good thinking, that one's up in a couple weeks too. Let's just do both tonight a...
body: Good thinking, that one's up in a couple weeks too. Let's just do both tonight and get it out of the way.

subject: Vendor invoice question
snippet: Hari, did you see the invoice from the caterer for your dad's party? The total l...
body: Hari, did you see the invoice from the caterer for your dad's party? The total looks higher than the quote they gave us.

subject: Re: Vendor invoice question
snippet: I noticed that too, I think they added the extra staffing fee we didn't ask for....
body: I noticed that too, I think they added the extra staffing fee we didn't ask for. I'll call them tomorrow morning and get it sorted before we pay.

subject: Apartment lease renewal
snippet: Landlord emailed about renewing the lease, they're offering 12 or 18 month optio...
body: Landlord emailed about renewing the lease, they're offering 12 or 18 month options. The 18 month one has a slightly lower monthly rate.

subject: Re: Apartment lease renewal
snippet: 18 months feels like a long commitment but the savings add up. Are we still happ...
body: 18 months feels like a long commitment but the savings add up. Are we still happy with the building, any issues we should raise before signing?

subject: Re: Apartment lease renewal
snippet: Honestly no complaints besides the slow elevator. I say we go with 18 months and...
body: Honestly no complaints besides the slow elevator. I say we go with 18 months and just mention the elevator thing to management while we're at it.

subject: Newsletter — this week's reads
snippet: Sending you the roundup from that education newsletter I subscribe to, there's a...
body: Sending you the roundup from that education newsletter I subscribe to, there's a good piece on project-based learning I think you'd like.

subject: Re: Newsletter — this week's reads
snippet: Reading it now, thanks for passing it along. The section on grading rubrics for ...
body: Reading it now, thanks for passing it along. The section on grading rubrics for group projects is actually really relevant to what I'm struggling with right now.

subject: Re: Newsletter — this week's reads
snippet: Thought that might be useful timing. There's also an older archived article link...
body: Thought that might be useful timing. There's also an older archived article linked at the bottom about peer assessment that pairs well with it.

subject: Re: Newsletter — this week's reads
snippet: Just read that one too. I might actually try a version of their peer assessment ...
body: Just read that one too. I might actually try a version of their peer assessment rubric next unit, it's simpler than what I've been using.

subject: Schedule check — kids pickup
snippet: Can you do pickup for the twins on Thursday? I've got a work thing running late ...
body: Can you do pickup for the twins on Thursday? I've got a work thing running late that day.

subject: Re: Schedule check — kids pickup
snippet: Thursday should work, I don't have after-school duty that day. What time does th...
body: Thursday should work, I don't have after-school duty that day. What time does their program end again?

subject: Re: Schedule check — kids pickup
snippet: 5:30, but they let kids wait in the lobby until 5:45 if you're a few minutes beh...
body: 5:30, but they let kids wait in the lobby until 5:45 if you're a few minutes behind. Also can you grab their backpacks from the front desk, not the classroom?

subject: Re: Schedule check — kids pickup
snippet: Got it, front desk for backpacks. I'll leave school right at 5 to make sure I'm ...
body: Got it, front desk for backpacks. I'll leave school right at 5 to make sure I'm not cutting it close.

subject: Re: Schedule check — kids pickup
snippet: Perfect, thank you so much for covering this. I'll owe you one, maybe I'll handl...
body: Perfect, thank you so much for covering this. I'll owe you one, maybe I'll handle the whole morning routine Friday to make up for it.

subject: Family vacation planning
snippet: I was looking at flights for the summer trip, prices are already creeping up. Sh...
body: I was looking at flights for the summer trip, prices are already creeping up. Should we just book now for the week we talked about?

subject: Re: Family vacation planning
snippet: Let's book it, waiting probably won't save us anything at this point. I'll check...
body: Let's book it, waiting probably won't save us anything at this point. I'll check with the school about the exact days off so we don't overlap with any mandatory training.

subject: Weekend plans
snippet: Any thoughts on this weekend? I was thinking we could finally check out that hik...
body: Any thoughts on this weekend? I was thinking we could finally check out that hiking trail everyone's been talking about.

subject: Re: Weekend plans
snippet: I'm down for hiking, Saturday morning would be best for me before it gets too ho...
body: I'm down for hiking, Saturday morning would be best for me before it gets too hot. Should we pack lunch or just grab something after?

subject: Re: Weekend plans
snippet: Let's pack lunch, there's supposed to be a nice lookout point about halfway that...
body: Let's pack lunch, there's supposed to be a nice lookout point about halfway that'd be perfect for it. I'll handle snacks if you sort the water bottles.

subject: Lesson plan review — derivatives
snippet: Hey Hari, looked over the derivatives unit — solid, but the warm-up runs lon...
body: Hey Hari, looked over the derivatives unit — solid, but the warm-up runs long. Trim to 5 min.

body: Hari, the requisition for limits cleared. Reimbursement posts next cycle.
